description: Candidate real-bug benchmark for BioTest comparative evaluation. 32 historical VCF/SAM-related bugs across 4 SUTs. All htsjdk/pysam/biopython entries are UNVERIFIED — pre_fix/post_fix versions must be confirmed in Phase-0 pre-flight against release notes before they enter the live benchmark. Seqan3 entries use commit SHAs directly. Bugs that fail verification are dropped per Bohme et al. ICSE'22 discipline. Expected post-verification N: 18-25 of 32.

anchor.verification_rule: PR #1708 merged 2024-06-04, shipped in htsjdk 4.1.1 on 2024-06-29 with CRAM multi-container fix cited

trigger.description: CRAM multi-container reference region state corruption on multi-container writes. Reads at position 1 corrupt in CRAM 3.0.0+.

anchor.verification_rule: PR #1590 merged 2022-02-07, first in htsjdk 3.0.0 on 2022-06-06 (CRAM 'BB' read-feature restoration)

trigger.description: CRAM 'BB' (Bases) read features not correctly restored during parsing; bases silently dropped.

anchor.verification_rule: PR #1592 merged 2022-04-25, first in htsjdk 3.0.0 on 2022-06-06 (CRAM 'SC' scores fix)

trigger.description: CRAM scores read features ('SC' data series) misdecoded during normalization.

anchor.verification_rule: PR #1554 merged 2021-06-10, first in htsjdk 3.0.0 on 2022-06-06 (AC/AN/AF filtered genotypes)

trigger.description: AC/AN/AF allele counts include filtered genotypes marked FT; should exclude filtered variants.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 3.0.4 (2022-11-23) hotfix reverted PR #1593 which had caused #1637's VCF sort-order regression

trigger.description: VCF sort order changed to use alleles for stability; breaks merging of existing valid VCFs causing false 'unsorted' errors.

anchor.verification_rule: release_notes_must_reference_1117_or_BCF2LazyGenotypesDecoder_NPE
anchor.dropped_reason: NPE in BCF2LazyGenotypesDecoder — no linked PR in release notes

trigger.description: NullPointerException in BCF2LazyGenotypesDecoder.parse() when reading BCF converted from VCF.

anchor.verification_rule: release_notes_must_reference_1686_or_spanning_deletion_getType
anchor.dropped_reason: spanning-deletion getType — issue open, no merged fix

trigger.description: Inconsistent VariantContext.getType() on spanning deletion alleles: <DEL>,* classified INDEL but <INS>,* not.

anchor.verification_rule: release_notes_must_reference_1026_or_multithreaded_VCFEncoder
anchor.dropped_reason: multithreaded VCFEncoder — PR #1636 remains unmerged as of 2022-11

trigger.description: VCFEncoder.addGenotypeData throws 'Allele X is not an allele in variant context' in multithreaded read-then-write.
trigger.notes: Requires multithreaded harness; may be hard to trigger without concurrent-access test wrapper.

anchor.verification_rule: release_notes_must_reference_761_or_filename_bcf_substring
anchor.dropped_reason: filename '.bcf' substring — no linked PR or resolution

trigger.description: Filenames containing '.bcf' substring cause VCF output to be written as BCF instead of VCF.
trigger.notes: Easily trigger with crafted filename like 'library.bcf<uuid>.g.vcf.gz'.

anchor.verification_rule: release_notes_must_reference_423_or_multiallelic_AF_AC_per_allele
anchor.dropped_reason: multiallelic AF/AC — feature request, no merged fix

trigger.description: Multiallelic AF/AC fields not parsed/cached per-allele; SelectVariants crashes on AF-based filtering.

anchor.verification_rule: Issue #1314 filed 2024-10-21 against 0.22.1; fix expected in 0.23.0 development stream

trigger.description: VariantFile.write() maps records to wrong contig when header contigs manually edited.

anchor.verification_rule: pysam 0.23.0 release notes explicitly cite 'VariantHeader.new_record GT setting (#1308)'

trigger.description: VariantHeader.new_record() fails to set GT field on second+ record creation; KeyError: 'invalid FORMAT: GT'.

anchor.verification_rule: Issue #966 filed 2020-11-06 against 0.16.0.1; 0.17.0 (2020-09-30) is the closest fix-bearing release by timeline

trigger.description: VariantRecord.stop returns wrong value for TRA records; returns POS instead of END INFO field.

anchor.verification_rule: pysam 0.21.0 release notes explicitly cite 'VariantHeader.new_record: set start/stop before alleles (#1175)'

trigger.description: INFO/END incorrectly omitted when writing VCF records with missing/symbolic alleles; affects SV representation.

anchor.verification_rule: NEWS_or_release_notes_must_reference_1225_or_haploid_PL_tuple
anchor.dropped_reason: haploid PL tuple — no PR linked, no fix version documented

trigger.description: VariantRecord expects wrong PL tuple length for haploid GT; 1-tuple GT raises error expecting 3-tuple PL.

anchor.verification_rule: pysam 0.16.0 release notes (2019-06-07) cite 'VariantFile.fetch() threw ValueError on empty files (#904)'

trigger.description: VariantFile.fetch() raises 'ValueError: fetch requires an index' on empty VCF even with valid tabix index.

anchor.verification_rule: pysam 0.17.0 release notes (2020-09-30) cite 'Eliminated file descriptor leaks in tabix_index() (#1038)'
anchor.notes: Resource-leak bug; may be hard to reproduce in 2h budget. Candidate for drop.

trigger.description: pysam.tabix_index() leaves file handles open when indexing ~20k VCF files; resource exhaustion.

anchor.verification_rule: Issue #641 predates 0.17.0; fix landed with index-customisation work in the 0.17.0 release stream

trigger.description: tabix_index() always creates CSI index for VCF files regardless of user choice.

anchor.verification_rule: NEWS_or_release_notes_must_reference_771_or_write_segfault_no_header
anchor.dropped_reason: VariantFile.write segfault on incomplete header — no merged PR

trigger.description: VariantFile.write() segfaults when VCF header missing ##FORMAT or ##contig entries.

anchor.verification_rule: Issue #450 was a 0.10.0 regression; 0.12.0 shipped the fix per NEWS entry referencing header-only files

trigger.description: VCF file with no variant records written without header (writes empty file); regression in 0.10.0.

anchor.verification_rule: PR #4837 merged 2024-09-23 (SAM deepcopy perf); first release after 1.85 is 1.86

trigger.description: Excessive copy.deepcopy() in SAM parser; perf degradation with potential correctness impact on large files.
trigger.notes: Primarily performance; correctness impact secondary. May be dropped.

anchor.verification_rule: CONTEXT_ONLY_not_a_bug
anchor.dropped_reason: Native BAM parsing — feature request, not a bug (per manifest notes)

trigger.description: Native BAM parsing not implemented; requires external CLI. Feature gap, not a bug.
trigger.notes: DROP CANDIDATE — include only as context in report narrative.

anchor.verification_rule: NEWS_rst_must_reference_4731_or_CIGAR_op_exposure
anchor.dropped_reason: CIGAR op details — no PR linked, no fix version documented

trigger.description: Biopython SAM parser does not expose CIGAR operation details (gaps, mismatches).

anchor.verification_rule: NEWS_rst_must_reference_1913_or_local_alignment_zero_score
anchor.dropped_reason: zero-score start residue — no merged PR found

trigger.description: Alignment scoring incorrect for local alignment with zero-score residue pairs at start.

anchor.verification_rule: NEWS_rst_must_reference_1699_or_soft_clip_query_coords
anchor.dropped_reason: soft-clip query coords — no PR linked

trigger.description: Bio.Align.sam doesn't expose query_start/query_end from CIGAR soft-clip operations.

anchor.verification_rule: NEWS_rst_must_reference_4769_or_PairwiseAligner_pairwise2_divergence
anchor.dropped_reason: PairwiseAligner vs pairwise2 — closed without linked PR

trigger.description: PairwiseAligner produces different alignments than legacy pairwise2; alignment score/path inconsistency.

anchor.verification_rule: git rev-parse confirmed: PR #2418 merge commit + parent

trigger.description: BAM parsing forgets to consume sequence bytes when creating dummy alignments; stream iterator misaligned, corrupts subsequent record reads.
trigger.notes: Trigger file test.bam.gz present in original issue #2417.

anchor.verification_rule: git rev-parse confirmed: PR #3081 merge commit + parent

trigger.description: Empty SAM/BAM output files invalid (no header written); file unusable unless records explicitly written.

anchor.verification_rule: git rev-parse confirmed: PR #3269 merge commit + parent

trigger.description: Banded alignment returns relative positions of sliced sequences instead of absolute positions of originals; off-by-prefix offset.

anchor.verification_rule: git rev-parse confirmed: PR #3098 merge commit + parent

trigger.description: Alignment score calculation wrong in traceback; incorrect carry bit tracking on up/left open directions causes wrong score.

anchor.verification_rule: git log --merges found merge commit edbfa956f for PR #2869 (correct_id_parsing_fasta)

trigger.description: FASTA parser fails on IDs containing '>' character; treats '> >MyID' as ID 'MyID' instead of '>MyID'.
trigger.notes: FASTA-adjacent — may be out of SAM scope; evaluate during pre-flight.

anchor.verification_rule: git rev-parse confirmed: PR #3406 merge commit + parent

trigger.description: BGZF stream data race condition in concurrent reads; non-deterministic corruption.
trigger.notes: Data race — requires multithreaded harness; may be hard to trigger reliably in 2h.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.0 release notes cite 'Tolerate mixed case NaNs and Infinities in VCF (#1364)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF codec rejects QUAL / INFO float values spelled with non-lowercase 'nan' or 'inf' (e.g. 'NaN', 'Inf', 'Infinity'), which htslib accepts per the VCF spec's float production rule. Causes differential disagreement on any VCF where upstream tools emit mixed-case float literals.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.0 release notes cite 'Output missing vcf fields as a single . (#1389)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF writer serialises multi-value missing fields as '.,.,.' (one dot per value) instead of the spec-canonical single '.' for fully-missing values. Round-trip through pre-fix htsjdk changes INFO/FORMAT string representation.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.0 release notes cite 'VCF codec should handle multiple missing GL fields (#1372)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF codec fails to handle FORMAT=GL when multiple per-genotype GL values are each individually missing ('.'). Throws instead of producing null, even though htslib accepts the input.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.0 release notes cite 'Handle PEDIGREE header lines differently for vcf4.2 vs vcf4.3 (#1401)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF header parser produces inconsistent PEDIGREE entries between VCF 4.2 and 4.3 inputs; the same semantic pedigree record round-trips differently depending on declared fileformat version.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.1 release notes cite 'fix bug in VariantContextBuilder (#1403)' — explicitly a hotfix for the 2.20.0 regression

trigger.description: Regression in VariantContextBuilder introduced in htsjdk 2.20.0 — the builder emits incorrect field values under certain chains; hotfix in 2.20.1 reverts the regression.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.21.0 release notes cite 'Make VCFHeader not throw exception if contig header lines lack length field (#1418)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF header parser throws on any '##contig=<ID=X>' header line that omits the length= attribute, even though the spec treats length as optional. htslib accepts such files; pre-fix htsjdk rejects them.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 3.0.0 release notes cite 'Added GVCF mode for VariantContext type determination (#1544)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VariantContext.getType() mis-classifies gVCF-style <NON_REF> records, producing wrong variant-type labels for gVCF blocks. Downstream tools that filter by variant type therefore miss entire classes of records.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 3.0.0 release notes cite 'Validate that SAM header tag keys are exactly 2 characters long (#1561)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix SAM header parser silently accepts @HD / @SQ / @RG / @PG lines with tag keys longer or shorter than 2 characters (SAM spec §1.3 mandates exactly 2). Malformed headers pass through pre-fix and produce SAMFileHeader objects with garbage-keyed attributes.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.24.1 release notes cite 'Invaliding out of date SAMRecord.mAlignmentBlocks cache (#1538)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix SAMRecord mutation (e.g. setCigar) does not invalidate the cached mAlignmentBlocks vector. Subsequent calls to getAlignmentBlocks() on the mutated record return stale data from before the CIGAR edit. Silent wrong answer on any mutation-followed-by-query pattern.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.23.0 release notes cite 'Fixed a bug in the locus accumulator where the accumulator did not add... (#1489)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix SAM locus accumulator drops certain insertion events, under-counting coverage at insert positions. Downstream pileup statistics computed via htsjdk disagree with samtools mpileup at these sites.

anchor.verification_rule: pysam 0.22.0 NEWS cites #1214 as fixed in the AlignmentFile cleanup

trigger.description: Pre-fix AlignmentFile iteration over certain malformed-but-spec-tolerated SAM files produces records with incorrect per-record fields. Fixed together with #939 as part of a broader AlignmentFile robustness pass in 0.22.0.

anchor.verification_rule: pysam 0.22.0 NEWS cites #939 as fixed in the AlignmentFile cleanup

trigger.description: Long-standing AlignmentFile bug in pysam <=0.21; the 0.22.0 release bundled its fix together with #1214. Specific symptom deferred to trigger-folder research.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.14.0 Bug Fixes: "A sample column value of 0|0 is not being parsed correctly (#176) (#187)"

trigger.description: Sample GT value '0|0' with GT undeclared in header causes a list artefact to leak into _genotype_updated, raising ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: "['0".

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.14.0 Bug Fixes: "escaped equal sign in INFO fields (#171) (#172)"

trigger.description: Escaped '=' in INFO (e.g., p.Lys%3D) is lost on re-write; comma is escaped but '=' is not, breaking round-trip.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.13.4: "Fix INFO flag raises TypeError (#146)"

trigger.description: INFO flag present but header declares it as String type; raises TypeError: argument of type 'bool' is not iterable.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.13.5: "Treat .bgz files the same as .gz (#145, #149)"

trigger.description: '.bgz'-suffixed bgzipped VCF not recognized by reader; open fails.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.12.2: "Fixing bug in case GT describes only one allele."

trigger.description: Haploid / partial-haploid GT describing only one allele parsed incorrectly.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.11.1: "Working around problem in HTSJDK output with incomplete FORMAT fields (#127)"

trigger.description: Incomplete trailing FORMAT fields (e.g. GATK 3.8 truncated output) raises KeyError: 'GQ'.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.9.0: "Fixing parsing of no-call GT fields"

trigger.description: No-call GT (./.) parsed incorrectly in very early vcfpy. Install-rot risk on 0.8.1 under modern Python.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.64: "vcf/record/info/field/value: Percent-decode character and string values ([#300])"

trigger.description: Writing an INFO String containing ';' produced unreadable VCF; round-trip broke. Fix: percent-decoding of string/char values.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.82: "vcf/io/writer/record/info/field/value: Remove colon (:) from encode set ([#339])"

trigger.description: Writer over-encoded ':' in INFO values and ';'/'=' in sample values, producing non-round-trippable output.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.58: "vcf/io/writer/record/reference_bases: Resolve IUPAC ambiguity codes ([#268])"

trigger.description: IUPAC ambiguity codes in REF caused writer to emit corrupted / truncated lines (e.g. two records merged).

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.49: "vcf/lazy/record/bounds: Fix range for info field ([#223])"

trigger.description: lazy::Record::info_range returned the FILTER byte range instead of INFO; callers reading INFO saw FILTER bytes.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.49: "vcf/reader/lazy_record: Disallow newlines to appear in fields ([#224])"

trigger.description: Lazy reader read past end-of-record into next line when optional trailing fields were missing, corrupting the buffer.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.56: "vcf/io/writer/header/record: Write newlines for records in other collections ([#259])"

trigger.description: Writer emitted multiple '##'-prefixed header records without separator newlines, producing a malformed header.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.59: "Parse other header record values that start with a map prefix (<) as a string if there is no map identifier ([#241])"

trigger.description: VCF 4.2 header with raw value starting with '<' but no ID= (e.g., ##ID=<Description="...">) raised MissingId parse error.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.64 Fixed: "Fix counting number of values" / "Fix iterating over empty lists"

trigger.description: array::values iterator mis-counted entries and didn't terminate on empty lists; wrong length / infinite loop for INFO/FORMAT arrays.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.24: "vcf/record/genotypes/genotype: Fail parsing when there are more values than keys."

trigger.description: Genotype parser silently dropped sample values after the last FORMAT key; header without trailing newline triggered an infinite loop.
